title: gh#59: R1.4 — Switch publish-worker to publishers map; drop parallel switches
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/59.
Backlog section: Candidate 1 — Publisher seam.

## Context

Fourth PR in Candidate 1. The wiring change that delivers the locality win: replaces the two parallel platform switches in `publish-worker.ts` with a single map lookup, and removes the `resolvedPlatform` mutable-state coordination workaround.

## Scope

- Modify `packages/worker/src/publish-worker.ts`:
  - `PublishHandlerDeps` gains `publishers?: Partial<Record<Platform, Publisher>>` with defaults from the new factories
  - Drop `callTwitterImpl`, `callLinkedInImpl`, `callFacebookImpl` separate overrides (subsumed)
  - Drop `checkLinkedInBudgetImpl`, `checkFacebookBudgetImpl` (untouched by this PR; budget check still callback-shaped — moved unchanged)
  - Drop the `resolvedPlatform: SupportedPlatform` mutable `let` and the six-line flow-analysis cast comment
  - The `publish` callback in `PublishContext` (passed to the lifecycle) becomes `publishers[platform].publish(profile, publishablePost, ctx)`
  - The catch block becomes platform-blind:
    ```ts
    if (err instanceof PostLifecycleAbort) { /* graceful skip */ }
    if (err instanceof PublishFailure) {
      if (err.kind === 'permanent') throw new UnrecoverableError(err.message);
      throw err; // transient — BullMQ retries
    }
    throw err;
    ```
- Modify `packages/worker/src/post-lifecycle.service.ts`:
  - `PublishContext.callTwitter` renamed to `publish` (or similar — caller-chosen)
  - The `extras` escape hatch is removed; `PublishablePost` carries platform-specific fields directly
  - Lifecycle loads media before constructing `PublishablePost` (text-only posts get `media: []`)
- Update existing publish-worker tests to use `publishers` override (one injection point) instead of three `callXImpl` overrides

## Out of scope

- Removing the old platform services and `error-classifier` (R1.5)
- TokenVault refactor (deferred per ADR-0002)
- Budget-loader dedupe (Candidate #6, independent)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/worker build` passes
- All existing worker tests pass with no behavior change
- `rg "resolvedPlatform" packages/worker/` returns nothing
- `rg "classifyTwitterError|classifyLinkedInError|classifyFacebookError" packages/worker/src/publish-worker.ts` returns nothing

## References

- ADRs: [0001](../blob/main/docs/adr/0001-publish-failure-is-thrown-not-returned.md), [0002](../blob/main/docs/adr/0002-publisher-receives-raw-profile-row.md)
- Depends on: #57, #58
